question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 3, 2AM ET
description:

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Terance Mann: Points Over 7.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 1 at 6:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Terance Mann scores more than 7.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Terance Mann scores 7.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Solana price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the SOL/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/sol-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream SOL/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 3, 3AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Tigres de la UANL vs. Pumas de la UNAM: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Liga MX game between Tigres de la UANL and Pumas de la UNAM, scheduled for January 14 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Tigres de la UANL and Pumas de la UNAM combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligamx.net. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be -2°C or below on January 3?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 3 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Brisbane International, Qualification: Rebecca Sramkova vs Lizette Cabrera
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Rebecca Sramkova and Lizette Cabrera in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 1 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Sramkova' if Rebecca Sramkova advances against Lizette Cabrera.

This market will resolve to 'Cabrera' if Lizette Cabrera advances against Rebecca Sramkova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will the highest temperature in Seoul be -1°C or below on January 3?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Incheon Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 3 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Incheon Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/kr/incheon/RKSI.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 2, 6:00AM-6:15AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Putintseva vs. Hon: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Yulia Putintseva and Priscilla Hon in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.
groupItemTitle: Brisbane International, Qualification: Yulia Putintseva vs Priscilla Hon Total Sets: O/U 2.5

events.title: Brisbane International, Qualification: Yulia Putintseva vs Priscilla Hon
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Yulia Putintseva and Priscilla Hon in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 1 at 10:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Putintseva' if Yulia Putintseva advances against Priscilla Hon.

This market will resolve to 'Hon' if Priscilla Hon advances against Yulia Putintseva.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Taylah Preston and Oksana Selekhmeteva in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.
groupItemTitle: Brisbane International, Qualification: Taylah Preston vs Oksana Selekhmeteva Total Sets: O/U 2.5

events.title: Brisbane International, Qualification: Taylah Preston vs Oksana Selekhmeteva
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Taylah Preston and Oksana Selekhmeteva in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 1 at 8:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Preston' if Taylah Preston advances against Oksana Selekhmeteva.

This market will resolve to 'Selekhmeteva' if Oksana Selekhmeteva advances against Taylah Preston.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Set 1 Winner: Preston vs Selekhmeteva
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Taylah Preston and Oksana Selekhmeteva in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 2026.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Green Bay Phoenix and Purdue Fort Wayne Mastodons combine to score 148 or more points in this game.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 3, 9AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Set Handicap: Sasnovich (-1.5) vs Tomova (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Aliaksandra Sasnovich and Viktoriya Tomova in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 2026.
This market will resolve to "Sasnovich" if Aliaksandra Sasnovich wins by 2 or more sets than Viktoriya Tomova, based on the final completed score. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Tomova."
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.
groupItemTitle: Brisbane International, Qualification: Viktoriya Tomova vs Aliaksandra Sasnovich Set Handicap +/-1.5

events.title: Brisbane International, Qualification: Viktoriya Tomova vs Aliaksandra Sasnovich
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Viktoriya Tomova and Aliaksandra Sasnovich in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 1 at 8:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Tomova' if Viktoriya Tomova advances against Aliaksandra Sasnovich.

This market will resolve to 'Sasnovich' if Aliaksandra Sasnovich advances against Viktoriya Tomova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Set Handicap: Putintseva (-1.5) vs Hon (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Yulia Putintseva and Priscilla Hon in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 2026.
This market will resolve to "Putintseva" if Yulia Putintseva wins by 2 or more sets than Priscilla Hon, based on the final completed score. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Hon."
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.
groupItemTitle: Brisbane International, Qualification: Yulia Putintseva vs Priscilla Hon Set Handicap +/-1.5

events.title: Brisbane International, Qualification: Yulia Putintseva vs Priscilla Hon
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Yulia Putintseva and Priscilla Hon in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 1 at 10:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Putintseva' if Yulia Putintseva advances against Priscilla Hon.

This market will resolve to 'Hon' if Priscilla Hon advances against Yulia Putintseva.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
